REDMIST-STRIKE_REDMIST.title: Strike
REDMIST-DEFEND_REDMIST.title: Defend
REDMIST-FOCUS_SPIRIT.title: Focus Spirit
REDMIST-ONRUSH.title: Onrush
REDMIST-ONRUSH.description:
#Deal !D! Damage. 
 If the target is killed, repeat this attack on a random enemy
REDMIST-UPSTANDING_SLASH.title: Upstanding Slash
REDMIST-UPSTANDING_SLASH.description: #Deal !D! damage {Repeat} times. If 10 or more Damage is unblocked, reduce the cost of ALL Upstanding Slash cards by 1 this combat and draw 1 card next turn.
REDMIST-SPEAR.title: Spear
REDMIST-SPEAR.description: #Deal !D! damage {Repeat} times. If 10 or more Damage is unblocked, reduce the cost of ALL Spear cards by 1 this combat and draw 1 card next turn.
REDMIST-LEVEL_SLASH.title: Level Slash
REDMIST-LEVEL_SLASH.description: #Deal !D! damage {Repeat} times, Apply {BleedPower} *Bleed. If 10 or more Damage is unblocked, reduce the cost of ALL Level Slash cards by 1 this combat and gain 1 energy next turn.
REDMIST-GREATER_SPLIT_VERTICAL.title: Greater Split: Vertical
REDMIST-GREATER_SPLIT_HORIZONTAL.title: Greater Split: Horizontal
REDMIST-QUICK_SLASH.title: Quick Slash
REDMIST-HOLLOW_POINT_SHELL.title: Hollow-Point Shell
REDMIST-HOLLOW_POINT_SHELL.description: #Deal !D! Damage. The target lose {StrengthLoss} *Strength this turn
REDMIST-PENITENCE.title: Penitence
REDMIST-RED_EYES.title: Red Eyes
REDMIST-MANIFEST_EGO.title: Manifest E.G.O
REDMIST-INSTINCTS.title: Instincts
REDMIST-INSTINCTS.description: #This turn, Heal {InstinctsPower} HP every time you cause damage
REDMIST-DONT_TOUCH_ME.title: Dont Touch Me
REDMIST-SPEED_UP.title: Speed Up
REDMIST-VENGEANCE.title: Vengeance
REDMIST-VENGEANCE.description: #Gain 1 *Strength for each 3 damage taken the previous turn, up to {VengeancePower}
REDMIST-FEAR_OF_WATER.title: Fear Of Water
REDMIST-FEAR_OF_WATER.description: #Whenever you deal unblocked attack damage, apply {FearOfWaterPower} *Bleed

REDMIST-TEST_BLEED.title: TestBleed
